## Testing

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style (ESLint + Prettier)
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode (no `any`)
- [ ] No hardcoded content in UI (data from JSON)
- [ ] New JSON fields have matching TypeScript types
- [ ] All colors use CSS custom properties
- [ ] Icons from `react-icons` only
- [ ] Components are server components by default (`"use client"` justified if used)
- [ ] Data validation passes (`npm run lint:data`)
- [ ] Content follows standards (ASCII, British English, no jargon)
